coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. Your aerobic system is thanking you right now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 75% FTP. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: the pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you're on a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Endurance pace. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.
